channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Saturday, June 13, 2026
item.description: Two stories this weekend demand your full attention, Midya. The Trump administration's decision to block foreign access to Anthropic's most powerful AI models — and simultaneously blacklist those models from US government use — is a watershed moment in AI geopolitics that will re...
